select_when: The team is stuck too early on one frame or one answer and needs to widen the option set before choosing a path.
Idea volume is genuinely valuable because the search space is still underexplored.
Novelty, reframing, or hidden alternatives matter more than early precision.
Divergence can be separated from evaluation so the group can generate before ranking.
avoid_when: Evaluation is creeping into generation and selectively developing only ideas that confirm the current direction.
The search space is already well explored and additional divergence would mostly delay commitment.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on widening option sets before judgment rather than on generic creativity enthusiasm.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor workshop-process sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on divergence before evaluation.
open_questions: The source overlaps with group dynamics, but the operational file stays on widening possibilities under explicit anti-anchoring discipline.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on early stuckness, option-set widening, and separating divergence from evaluation.

avoid_when.note: The first avoid line is explicit from the tension block; the second is reviewed normalization of overused divergence.

input_type.note: The typed label compresses the raw condition of a prematurely narrowed search space.

output_type.note: The output label compresses divergence into a reusable option-set artifact.

reasoning_types.note: The model relies on analogical option generation and reflective suspension of judgment.
